name: nfce-escrituracao
description: Escrituração fiscal — integração com serviços SEFAZ (NF-e, NFC-e) — SEFAZ-SP
author: Globalpac / Vitor Kloy

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && concurrently -k "next dev" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build: node scripts/sync-brand-icons.cjs && next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.release: node scripts/sync-brand-icons.cjs && next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.release:win: node scripts/sync-brand-icons.cjs && next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always
